single-volume publication that contains most frequently needed business contracts related forms.
Warren's Forms Agreements: Desk Edition comprehensively updated once annually covers following subjects: business entity formation governance, including those corporations, partnerships LLCs; purchases sales businesses, including purchase assets stock; real property transactions, including sales, leases property management; personal property transactions; intellectual property transactions.
This publication condensed version eight-volume Warren's Forms Agreements, such, convenient, single-volume forms book which used assistance drafting business contracts day-to-day basis.
This compact volume provides easy access quick reference while also allowing attorneys draft their customized forms using large variety specialized clauses each section.
